summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
summary.en: Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 plugins 相关功能、监控与吞吐展示、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面

  • 变更说明: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
  • 影响范围: 影响 hero-avatar 相关功能、角色与职业元数据、plugins 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 ai 相关功能、配置行为、Web 客户端流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

会话与消息流转细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了会话与消息流转细节，减少状态显示和交互过程中的混乱情况。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、分布式会话运行时、domain 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

模型与 Provider 相关配置细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了模型与 Provider 相关配置细节，减少接入和使用过程中的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 ai 相关功能、角色与职业元数据、配置行为。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Plugins, monitoring and throughput displays.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing project entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

HagiPower / Hero features

  • Change Summary: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.
  • Impact: Affects Hero Avatar, hero and role metadata, Plugins.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Ai, configuration behavior.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing supporting work entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Session and message flow details

  • Change Summary: Improved session and message flow details to reduce confusion in status display and interaction flows.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, distributed session runtime, Domain.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session and message flow details entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Model and provider configuration details

  • Change Summary: Improved model and provider configuration details to reduce integration and usage issues.
  • Impact: Affects Ai, configuration behavior, web client flows.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
